chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Appeal No.149 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. FOR HEARING OF CASE 2. FOR HEARING OF MA NO.2599/24 16.9.2025 Mr. Usman Siddiqui, advocate for appellant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. P.G. ------------------------------------------ Learned counsel for appellant appeared and states that the appellant has already been served out his sentence and in view of the completion of sentence, he does not press this appeal. Accordingly, Cr. Appeal No.149/2024 stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE asim/PA
